visual_result.reason: Even after hair_fit_v1 scaling, the hair pack and full-body clean base still look like mismatched sources. The pipeline proves local motion mechanics only and must not be promoted as a current visual baseline.

decision: Do not continue refining this exact composite as the production candidate.
next_action: Switch to a single-source character generation approach or generate base and hair as a matched pair before running BiRefNet_HR, local hair split, keypose generation, and Mini Cubism physics again.
